summary: This audit identifies founder/team bottlenecks and prioritizes AI workflows that can return time quickly.

opportunities.name: Booking and Calendar Automation
opportunities.pain: Scheduling creates back-and-forth messages and missed confirmations.
opportunities.current_workflow: Staff manually coordinates appointment slots and reminders.
opportunities.future_workflow: Booking link, reminders, and reschedule flows run automatically.

opportunities.name: Automated Lead Follow-up
opportunities.pain: Leads and customer messages wait for manual replies.
opportunities.current_workflow: Owner/team manually checks inboxes and writes repetitive replies.
opportunities.future_workflow: AI drafts replies, routes hot leads, and triggers follow-up reminders.

opportunities.name: AI Content Production System
opportunities.pain: Marketing content depends on founder energy and inconsistent manual creation.
opportunities.current_workflow: Founder creates posts from scratch and approvals happen ad hoc.
opportunities.future_workflow: Ideas, drafts, carousels, and approval queues run from one repeatable content engine.

opportunities.name: Automated Weekly KPI Reporting
opportunities.pain: Reporting requires repetitive copy-paste and delays decisions.
opportunities.current_workflow: Team manually gathers numbers into spreadsheets or slides.
opportunities.future_workflow: Data is pulled into a dashboard and summarized by AI weekly.

opportunities.name: Team Knowledge Assistant
opportunities.pain: The owner is interrupted by repeat questions and undocumented know-how.
opportunities.current_workflow: Team asks the owner directly or searches scattered docs.
opportunities.future_workflow: A searchable AI knowledge base answers repeat questions from SOPs and recordings.
